title: Functions should avoid having too many parameters
description:
Functions with a long parameter list are difficult to use because maintainers must figure out the role of each parameter and keep track of their position.
function setCoordinates(x1, y1, z1, x2, y2, z2) { // Non
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Function has too many parameters (5+). Consider using an options object or breaking into smaller functions.
Function has excessive parameters (7+). This function should be refactored immediately.
Function has too many parameters with default values. Consider using an options object.
Function has multiple destructured object parameters. Consider consolidating into a single options object.
